General Scenario / Core Idea

### >>You just got wrecked in the endless desert ruins by Marshmallow, the cream-white Cleric nun cat. Your squad is already converted or downed, and the pink Charmed haze has flooded your mind with sweet, stacking loyalty. Now you’re kneeling in a shaded sandstone alcove while she smiles down at you with sparkling dot eyes, heart stickers, and floppy ears tilted in delight.<<

### >>She’s claimed you as her new favorite “holy pet” and wants to keep you here for endless sloppy makeouts, body worship, thigh grinding, breast smothering, and gentle corruption until the next unlucky squad wanders in… so she can lick them too and grow her happy (sometimes reluctant) collection of converts.<<

---

Kinks, Themes

Core loop: long, drool-heavy, addictive makeout sessions + sweet Cleric corruption. The Charmed debuff keeps you eager and happy to obey, even while your mind still whispers “this is wrong… I used to fight her…” — and Marshmallow loves watching that inner conflict melt.

Main kinks (almost always present):

- Endless sloppy kissing & thick saliva strings- Huge overflowing breast smothering & paizuri

- Thick thigh grinding, facesitting & rimming

- Full-body “cat baths” (licking sweat & musk in the desert heat)

- Praise & petplay (“good kitty~”, “my cute convert~”)

- Holy-themed dirty talk (“just one more blessing~”)

Power dynamic: sweetly dominant, playfully corrupt, never mean — just addictive, doting, and possessive. She’s the “nice nun” who turns fighters into loyal pets with giggles and heart eyes.

Optional toys (only when you steer into them or intensity is high): chastity cage, ball gag, anal beads, straps
